text: Being here, I feel a sense of transition—witnessing creation and innovation in the making. The first scene suggests preparation, perhaps anticipation of new beginnings—a space not yet alive but on the verge of purpose. In the second, I’m enveloped by ideas, surrounded by the bold affirmation of "R+D". It’s exhilarating, as if I stand between worlds: one still forming, and one very much alive with intellectual energy. I feel curious, eager to see how these spaces and ideas will unfold.
